results.rendered_html:
1. aparvan (3. a + pa˚) n.
1〉 eine Stelle, wo kein Gelenk ist: ahiṃ vajreṇa vi riṇā aparvan  ṚV. 4,19,3 .
— 2〉 ein Tag, der nicht parvan (s. d.) ist: calatyaparvaṇi mahī  HARIV. 4262 . rāhuragrasadādityamaparvaṇi 9872 . śiro 'parvaṇi muṇḍitam  PAÑCAT. IV, 49 .

results.rendered_html:
aparvan a. Without a joint.
— n.
1 No joint or point of conjunction.
2 A day which is not a parvan i. e. not the proper time or season (the Parva days being amāvāsyā, paurṇimā, aṣṭamī, caturdaśī &c.); aparvaṇi grahakaluṣeṃdumaṃḍalā vibhāvarī kathaya kathaṃ bhaviṣyati  M. 4. 15. 
Comp.
— daṃḍaḥ a sort of sugar-cane.
